title: State Benefits Portal Modernization RFP
summary: A state agency RFP is strategically attractive, but the response requires coordinated legal, security, finance, and implementation review before BD/Ops can commit proposal resources.

specialist_lanes.purpose: Review contract exposure before proposal commitment.
Review regulated citizen data, residency, and DPA requirements.
Review pricing, margin, cost proposal, and service-credit exposure.
Review delivery feasibility before bid/no-bid commitment.

expected_evidence.source_phrase: liability cap equal to three times annual fees
expected_evidence.downstream_use: Triggers Legal review for nonstandard liability exposure.

expected_evidence.source_phrase: vendor will indemnify the agency for third-party claims arising from portal operations
expected_evidence.downstream_use: Triggers Legal review for negotiation conditions.

expected_evidence.source_phrase: regulated citizen benefits data including eligibility records and household income
expected_evidence.extracted_fact: The workflow processes regulated citizen data.
expected_evidence.downstream_use: Triggers Security review and DPA/residency conditions.

expected_evidence.source_phrase: data processing addendum is required but not attached
expected_evidence.extracted_fact: Required DPA is missing from the packet.

expected_evidence.source_phrase: cost proposal must include fixed implementation fees, optional support tiers, and service credits
expected_evidence.extracted_fact: Cost proposal and service-credit exposure require finance review.
expected_evidence.downstream_use: Triggers Finance review for margin and credit exposure.

expected_evidence.source_phrase: estimated contract value is $4.8M over the initial term
expected_evidence.extracted_fact: Opportunity value is above finance review threshold.
expected_evidence.downstream_use: Adds Finance review and BD/Ops strategic fit signal.

expected_evidence.source_phrase: production launch is requested within 12 weeks of award
expected_evidence.downstream_use: Triggers Implementation review for staffing feasibility.

expected_evidence.source_phrase: legacy eligibility mainframe integration is required during phase one
expected_evidence.extracted_fact: Legacy integration is a delivery dependency.
expected_evidence.downstream_use: Creates Implementation condition for integration discovery.

department_packets.action_needed: Determine whether state contract terms are acceptable for qualification or require negotiation conditions.
key_information: Liability cap is three times annual fees.
Broad indemnity language applies to third-party portal operations claims.
Insurance and audit obligations must be confirmed before submission.
department_packets.ai_generated_task: Confirm negotiation position for liability cap, indemnity, insurance, and audit-right language.

department_packets.action_needed: Confirm whether regulated data handling can be accepted before proposal submission.
key_information: The portal will process regulated citizen benefits data.
The DPA is required but missing from the packet.
Data residency answer must be confirmed before bid commitment.
department_packets.ai_generated_task: Request the DPA and residency clarification, then document security conditions for BD/Ops.

department_packets.action_needed: Assess margin feasibility and commercial exposure before proposal resources are committed.
key_information: Cost proposal must include fixed implementation fees and support tiers.
Service credits may create margin exposure if delivery slips.
department_packets.ai_generated_task: Build preliminary cost model and flag pricing conditions for BD/Ops.

department_packets.action_needed: Confirm whether delivery can support the requested scope and timeline.
key_information: Production launch is requested within 12 weeks of award.
Legacy eligibility mainframe integration is required in phase one.
Staffing must be reserved before final bid/no-bid approval.
department_packets.ai_generated_task: Confirm staffing plan and integration discovery assumptions for the qualification decision.

specialist_conclusions.decision: Acceptable for qualification if liability and indemnity language are negotiated before final bid.
specialist_conclusions.note: No immediate no-bid blocker, but liability cap and broad indemnity should be treated as proposal conditions.
specialist_conclusions.result: Legal packet complete with negotiation condition.

specialist_conclusions.decision: Proceed only after the agency provides the DPA and confirms data residency requirements.
specialist_conclusions.note: Regulated citizen data is supportable, but the missing DPA and residency answer must be resolved before submission.
specialist_conclusions.result: Security packet returned with required follow-up.

specialist_conclusions.decision: Margin appears feasible if implementation staffing estimate and service-credit exposure are controlled.
specialist_conclusions.note: The $4.8M value supports pursuit, but finance needs a preliminary model before final bid authorization.
specialist_conclusions.result: Finance packet complete with cost-model condition.

specialist_conclusions.decision: Delivery is feasible if two engineers are reserved and legacy integration discovery starts before award.
specialist_conclusions.note: The 12-week launch is tight but manageable if discovery and staffing are treated as bid conditions.
specialist_conclusions.result: Implementation packet complete with staffing and discovery conditions.

ai_synthesis.summary: The opportunity is strategically attractive and commercially meaningful, but BD/Ops should not authorize full proposal work until the specialist conditions are assigned and tracked.
conditions: Legal must define the negotiation position for liability and indemnity.
Security must obtain the missing DPA and data residency answer.
Finance must complete the preliminary cost and service-credit model.
Implementation must reserve staffing and begin legacy integration discovery.
unresolved_questions: Will the agency accept negotiated liability and indemnity language?
What data residency commitments are required for regulated citizen data?
Does the staffing model preserve target margin after service-credit exposure?

evidence_map.source_phrase: liability cap equal to three times annual fees
evidence_map.ai_finding: Legal exposure requires review before bid commitment.
evidence_map.specialist_packet: Legal packet asks reviewer to define negotiation position.
evidence_map.specialist_conclusion: Legal approves qualification with liability negotiation condition.
evidence_map.bd_ops_use: BD/Ops proceeds only if proposal owner tracks liability condition.

evidence_map.source_phrase: vendor will indemnify the agency for third-party claims arising from portal operations
evidence_map.ai_finding: Indemnity language creates legal negotiation risk.
evidence_map.specialist_packet: Legal packet includes indemnity as a required review item.
evidence_map.specialist_conclusion: Legal requires negotiation position before final bid.
evidence_map.bd_ops_use: BD/Ops includes legal negotiation as an approved next step.

evidence_map.source_phrase: regulated citizen benefits data including eligibility records and household income
evidence_map.extracted_fact: The workflow processes regulated citizen data.
evidence_map.ai_finding: Regulated data handling requires security review.
evidence_map.specialist_packet: Security packet asks reviewer to confirm supportability.
evidence_map.specialist_conclusion: Security says supportable if privacy artifacts are completed.
evidence_map.bd_ops_use: BD/Ops keeps pursuit active but conditions it on security follow-up.

evidence_map.source_phrase: data processing addendum is required but not attached
evidence_map.extracted_fact: Required DPA is missing from the packet.
evidence_map.ai_finding: Missing DPA creates unresolved security/privacy requirement.
evidence_map.specialist_packet: Security packet requests DPA and data residency clarification.
evidence_map.bd_ops_use: BD/Ops assigns missing DPA as a blocking follow-up before final bid.

evidence_map.source_phrase: estimated contract value is $4.8M over the initial term
evidence_map.extracted_fact: Opportunity value is above finance review threshold.
evidence_map.ai_finding: High-value opportunity supports strategic pursuit but needs commercial review.
evidence_map.specialist_packet: Finance packet asks reviewer to assess margin feasibility.
evidence_map.specialist_conclusion: Finance says pursuit is feasible if model validates margin.
evidence_map.bd_ops_use: BD/Ops weighs value as a positive qualification signal.

evidence_map.source_phrase: cost proposal must include fixed implementation fees, optional support tiers, and service credits
evidence_map.extracted_fact: Cost proposal and service-credit exposure require finance review.
evidence_map.ai_finding: Commercial terms require finance model before proposal commitment.
evidence_map.specialist_packet: Finance packet asks for cost model and service-credit exposure review.
evidence_map.bd_ops_use: BD/Ops assigns cost model before final bid/no-bid meeting.

evidence_map.source_phrase: production launch is requested within 12 weeks of award
evidence_map.specialist_packet: Implementation packet asks delivery lead to confirm staffing.
evidence_map.specialist_conclusion: Delivery lead says feasible with two engineers reserved.
evidence_map.bd_ops_use: BD/Ops proceeds only if staffing is reserved before proposal work scales.

evidence_map.source_phrase: legacy eligibility mainframe integration is required during phase one
evidence_map.extracted_fact: Legacy integration is a delivery dependency.
evidence_map.ai_finding: Legacy integration creates delivery discovery risk.
evidence_map.specialist_packet: Implementation packet requests integration discovery assumptions.
evidence_map.specialist_conclusion: Implementation requires early discovery before award.
evidence_map.bd_ops_use: BD/Ops adds integration discovery to approved next steps.

audit_events.summary: RFP, draft terms, pricing, implementation notes, and security questionnaire received.
Structured facts and evidence phrases extracted from source documents.
Conditional bid recommended with Legal as primary route and three supporting review lanes.
Legal, Security, Finance, and Implementation packets created from evidence-backed findings.
Legal approved qualification with liability and indemnity negotiation conditions.
Security requested DPA and data residency follow-up before final bid.
Implementation approved with staffing and legacy integration discovery conditions.
Finance approved qualification with preliminary margin model condition.
Specialist conclusions synthesized into BD/Ops decision packet.
Proceed to qualification with conditions logged as final business decision.
Demo KPIs updated for routed case, review completion, and human-modified recommendation.

expected_bd_ops_decision.ai_synthesis_recommendation: Proceed only if Legal confirms acceptable liability language, Security obtains the DPA and residency answer, Finance validates margin, and Implementation confirms staffing for the 12-week launch.
expected_bd_ops_decision.owner_note: BD/Ops accepts the AI synthesis as a qualification recommendation and assigns conditions before the final bid/no-bid meeting.
approved_next_steps: Confirm insurance and liability negotiation position
Request missing DPA and data residency answers
Confirm staffing plan for the 12-week launch
